description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular green plot with a paved driveway leading to a gated entrance and a detached garage. The main building features large, vertically oriented windows and a flat roof, giving it a contemporary appearance. The property is enclosed by a decorative fence with prominent pillars and metal gates, providing both security and aesthetic appeal. The driveway curves from the main gate to the house and continues to the garage, which is separated from the main structure. The lawn is well-maintained and surrounds the house and driveway, with no visible landscaping elements such as trees or shrubs. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open space, and functional access to both the house and garage.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a gated driveway leading to a detached garage on a green plot. The property is enclosed by a decorative fence with pillars and metal gates.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side of the bungalow with large windows, the driveway, and the detached garage in the background, along with the main gate and fence.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the garage and the long driveway leading from the gate, with the side of the bungalow visible and the fence running along the property edge.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front of the bungalow with the main entrance, the driveway, and the prominent gated fence in the foreground.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the rear and side of the bungalow, the garage, and the full extent of the fence and gates, emphasizing the layout of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large vertical windows on multiple sides
